reviews.review_description:
Now museum, now you don't.

This app is extremely high quality. Platinum grade. Rich luxurious opulence and extravagant elegance. The beauty within this app is profound.

I recognize these rooms as the collection of some certain rooms all joined together from Puzzling Places which had the Smoking Room, the Pool room etc.

I hope that the developer goes on with VR because this developer certainly has a talent with VR.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review. I appreciate your support. If you have suggestions to improve the app please share them. You can also see my other apps on my profile Virtual Art Gallery VR Exhibition and 3D Scan Explorer VR Environments

reviews.review_description:
This app invites you to explore beautifully detailed historical interiors, filled with antiques, classic furniture, and period decor, in a calm and contemplative atmosphere, without objectives, stress, or a timer. A simple and free app, perfect for stress-free cultural exploration. Short but sweet.
EDIT: A big thank you to the dev for their responsiveness and commitment to providing the best possible experience.

developer_response.body:
Français:
Tout d’abord, merci pour votre évaluation. J’ai bien noté vos remarques et je vais travailler à améliorer l’application. Très probablement, je publierai une nouvelle version d’ici une semaine. Merci d’avoir contribué à rendre l’application meilleure.

English:
First of all, thank you for your review. I’ve noted your feedback and I’ll work on improving the app. I will most likely release an updated version within a week. Thank you for helping make the app better.

Türkçe:
Öncelikle değerlendirmeniz için teşekkür ederim. Söylediklerinizi not aldım ve uygulamayı geliştirmek için çalışacağım. Büyük ihtimalle 1 hafta içinde güncellenmiş hâlini yayınlamış olurum. Uygulamanın daha iyi olmasına katkı sağladığınız için teşekkür ederim.

reviews.review_description: Maybe it was just me but this app is trash. Going through walls to end up what appeared to be inside burnt walls.
It's wonderful app, thank you for all the efforts but unfortunately very bad quality, we can't see details.
